query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN email LIKE '%@gmail.%' THEN 'gmail'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@hotmail.%' THEN 'hotmail'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@yahoo.%' THEN 'yahoo'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@outlook.%' THEN 'outlook'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@live.%' THEN 'live'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@icloud.%' THEN 'icloud'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@aol.%' THEN 'aol'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@msn.%' THEN 'msn'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@me.com' THEN 'me.com'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@protonmail.%' THEN 'protonmail'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@mail.com' THEN 'mail.com'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@bigpond.%' THEN 'bigpond'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@optusnet.%' THEN 'optusnet'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@telstra.%' THEN 'telstra'
    WHEN email IS NULL THEN 'no_email'
    ELSE 'corporate'
  END as email_type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM campaignContacts
GROUP BY email_type
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

  CASE 
    WHEN email LIKE '%@gmail.%' THEN 'gmail'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@hotmail.%' THEN 'hotmail'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@yahoo.%' THEN 'yahoo'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@outlook.%' THEN 'outlook'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@live.%' THEN 'live'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@icloud.%' THEN 'icloud'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@aol.%' THEN 'aol'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@msn.%' THEN 'msn'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@me.com' THEN 'me.com'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@protonmail.%' THEN 'protonmail'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@mail.com' THEN 'mail.com'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@bigpond.%' THEN 'bigpond'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@optusnet.%' THEN 'optusnet'
    WHEN email LIKE '%@telstra.%' THEN 'telstra'
    WHEN email IS NULL THEN 'no_email'
    ELSE 'corporate'
  END as email_type,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM campaignContacts
GROUP BY email_type
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
